turningValues.scene: The system failure and impending data loss

stakes.description: Marcus's desire to maintain his peaceful, low-stress lifestyle
The loss of three million users' data and the company's collapse
The professional future and well-being of the junior engineering team

Maintain control and save the company from the board

themeDeliveries.theme: Competence is a burden that cannot be ignored

The contrast between the brilliant junior engineers and the failing monolithic architecture

The engineering team vs the failing monolithic architecture

premiseCounterPremise.premise: True expertise carries an inherent responsibility to lead
premiseCounterPremise.counterPremise: One has the right to opt out of the rat race for personal sanity
